corrections_by_claim.note: The article mentions AI research and innovation, but provides no financial data on R&D spending or analysis of whether such spending is productive or rent-seeking.
No engagement with the source of profitability or the mechanism of indexing vs. data extraction.
Mentions of US export controls and H-1B visa fees are regulatory/geopolitical outcomes, not evidence of the state's constitutive role in building the firms' original market dominance.
No discussion of profit rates or Marxist categories of rent vs. profit.
No balance-sheet data or discussion of tangible vs. intangible assets.
No engagement with the theoretical debate over expropriation vs. exploitation.
